productDisplayName: Doodle Boys living Upto White Tshirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed neckline and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach or iron on print Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed This doodle T-shirt is designed to make your little bundle of mischief look cute while staying comfortable all day with the cotton fabric. The hue is a tribute to childish innocence, while the print showcases love for all things sporty. Pair it with a denims and pink floaters for unbridled comfort.
